Rappen,</PRIZE> und viele andere mehr, davon der Bericht bey Ihme zu vernemmen.</BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":14,"explanation":"Corrected encoding issues (mojibake) where UTF-8 characters were misinterpreted as MacRoman (e.g., '√ü' to 'ß', '√†' to 'à', '√§' to 'ä'). Restored 'Würmen' from 'W√ºrmen' context. Corrected the book format '8v√≤' (decoding to '8vü') to the standard '8vo.' (Octavo). parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>Bey Herrn Daniel Haag dem Buchbinder sind zu verkauffen: <BIBL><TITLE>Steiners Fest-Gedancken</TITLE> in <FORMAT>Fol.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>2. fl. 24. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Neues und vollkommenes Gebettbuch</TITLE> in <FORMAT>groß 8vo.</FORMAT> von <AUTHOR>Pfarrer Stehelin</AUTHOR> in <PLACE>St. Gallen</PLACE>, ohngebunden <PRIZE>46. kr.</PRIZE>; gebunden in Leder und Schlotz à <PRIZE>fl. 1. 10. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Memoires de Rochester</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> ohngebunden à <PRIZE>6. Batzen;</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Maupertuis</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Anfäng der Geographie</TITLE> <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>6. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Messung des Meridians Gradus</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>12. Batzen;</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Satura pars II.</TITLE> <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>18. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Gespräch von den Würmen welche bey Anfang dieses Jahrs auf dem Schnee gefunden worden</TITLE> à <PRIZE>8. Rappen,</PRIZE> und viele andere mehr, davon der Bericht bey Ihme zu vernemmen.</BIBL></ITEM>
parsed.explanation: Corrected encoding issues (mojibake) where UTF-8 characters were misinterpreted as MacRoman (e.g., '√ü' to 'ß', '√†' to 'à', '√§' to 'ä'). Restored 'Würmen' from 'W√ºrmen' context. Corrected the book format '8v√≤' (decoding to '8vü') to the standard '8vo.' (Octavo). Fixed XML structure by adding a missing closing </BIBL> tag for the 'Memoires de Rochester' entry to prevent invalid nesting of subsequent books. Standardized the single instance of <PRICE> to <PRIZE>.
